fast-masa-config.gui.quick.title: Fast Masa Config
fast-masa-config.gui.quick.subtitle: Hold the hotkey to keep this panel open
fast-masa-config.gui.quick.empty: No shortcuts yet. Add them in the full UI.
fast-masa-config.gui.quick.empty_enabled: No enabled boolean shortcuts right now.
fast-masa-config.gui.quick.summary_hidde: Scan summary is hidden by config.
fast-masa-config.gui.quick.status.ready: Mouse is free. Movement keys keep going.
fast-masa-config.gui.quick.status.failed: CSV export failed. See client log.
fast-masa-config.gui.full.hotkey_setting:
Left click: advanced hotkey settings
Right click: reset hotkey settings
fast-masa-config.gui.full.empty_shortcut: No shortcuts yet. Add supported configs from All Configs or enter an ID below.
fast-masa-config.gui.full.empty_search: No matching entries. Try a mod name, group, display name, or config ID.
fast-masa-config.gui.full.status.not_fou: No supported config matched that ID.
fast-masa-config.gui.full.status.move_bl: Shortcut is already at the edge.
fast-masa-config.gui.full.status.duplica: That config is already in the panel.
Hold this hotkey to show the quick config panel.
Width of the quick config panel.
Maximum height of the quick config panel. Extra shortcuts become scrollable.
Scale of the quick config panel.
Background opacity of the quick config panel. Lower values are more transparent and do not affect text or controls.
Show registered mod and visible config counts in the quick panel.
Close the quick panel when the open hotkey is released.
Close the quick panel when the inventory key or Escape is pressed.
fast-masa-config.config.shortcuts.commen: One shortcut target per line. Use modId/groupId/configName or modId:configName.
